channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cheating scandal rocks World Conkers Championships in England
item.description: A cheating scandal has rocked the world of competitive conkers. A man was accused of using a steel chestnut in the World Conker Championships on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Angel Reese says her little brother lied about a key aspect about her basketball career
item.description: Angel Reese esponded to a video of her brother, 21-year-old Maryland men's basketball player Julian Reese, claiming that she is not a natural left-hander.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American surfer Bethany Hamilton seeks support, treatment advice for hospitalized family member
item.description: Bethany Hamilton survived a shark attack and went on to became a pro surfer. She is now doing everything she can to help her nephew overcome his own set of challenges.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CMU women's soccer is on fire and feeling good
item.description: Following a huge 2-1 road win over MSU Denver, Colorado Mesa women's soccer has won five games in a row.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Davante Adams makes surprise guest TV appearance alongside Aaron Rodgers hours after trade to Jets
item.description: Former Packers stars Davante Adams and Aaron Rodgers will reunite, but this time they will both be wearing a different shade of green following a reported blockbuster trade.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Steelers legend 'would absolutely not even think about' replacing Justin Fields with Russell Wilson
item.description: The Pittsburgh Steelers may be 4-2 with Justin Fields, but they apparently are considering going with Russell Wilson this week against the Jets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell says the league still reviewing latest claims against Deshaun Watson
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell said the league is still reviewing the latest claims of sexual assault and battery against Deshaun Watson.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump praises Brock Purdy emerging as 49ers star after being drafted last: 'There's a little luck in sports'
item.description: Former President Trump had high praise for 49ers quarterback Brock Purdy during a recent interview with Barstool Sports' "Bussin' With The Boys.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL owners approve Jacksonville's $1.4 billion 'stadium of the future' set to open in 2028
item.description: NFL owners unanimously approved Jacksonville's $1.4 billion “stadium of the future” Tuesday, a decision that should keep the Jaguars in one of the league's smallest markets for at least another 30 years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 76ers' Paul George diagnosed with bone bruise but no structural damage after hyperextending knee
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Philadelphia 76ers forward Paul George has a bone bruise but did not suffer any structural damage when he hyperextended his left knee during a preseason game, the team said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: Pitcher Alex Cobb has been dropped from the Cleveland Guardians AL Championship Series roster after getting hurt in the opener and has been replaced by fellow right-hander Ben Lively, the team’s winningest pitcher during the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Pro soccer club with player who refused to sign gay pride shirt says he is staying with the team
item.description: VfL Wolfsburg player Kevin Behrens is still with the team and training with his teammates despite an incident where he refused to sign a gay pride shirt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028: Where will it be played before that?
item.description: Atlanta has secured the 2028 Super Bowl - here are the other cities that will host the NFL's championship game before then.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers-Mets NLCS Game 1 draws huge audience for FOX Sports
item.description: Game 1 of the National League Championship Series between the New York Mets and Los Angeles Dodgers drew big numbers for FOX Sports on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Logano gets back into playoffs following Bowman disqualification and has sights set on 3rd Cup title
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Joey Logano hoped he'd done enough to advance in NASCAR's playoffs with an eighth-place finish at Charlotte Motor Speedway. But when he left the track Sunday night, he was four points below the cutline and eliminated from any shot at winning a third Cup Series title.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The cost of rising number of injuries in European soccer nears $800 million, report finds
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — The rising number of injuries to top soccer players came at a cost of nearly $800 million to teams across Europe's leading leagues last season, according to a report published Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets acquire Raiders wide receiver Davante Adams, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Man United great Alex Ferguson to step down as club ambassador in latest change under Jim Ratcliffe
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Manchester United great Alex Ferguson will step down from his lucrative role as club ambassador at the end of the season, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Too many men: No. 2 Oregon purposely induced late penalty in win over No. 4 Ohio State
item.description: EUGENE, Ore. (AP) — No. 2 Oregon had 12 men on the field late in its 32-31 win over No. 4 Ohio State, with the resulting penalty causing precious seconds to wind off the clock. Turns out, it was on purpose.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Food & Supply drive ahead of Tampa Bay Lightning game
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning hope to be the light tonight in a community devastated by back-to-back hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Chloe Sparks, WFLA, NBC

item.title: For Johnny and Matthew: Blue Jackets play their home opener with Gaudreaus in mind
item.description: Johnny Gaudreau’s Columbus teammates were given a few options for how to handle their emotions during the Blue Jackets’ home opener.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cam Rising out for the season with lower leg injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising's return to the field lasted all of one game. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham announced on Monday that Rising is out for the season after suffering a lower leg injury on the first series in Friday's 27-19 loss at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey hands Utah its first loss, 3-0
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring an NHL-leading 16 goals through the first three games of the season, the Utah Hockey Club had a devil of a time scoring at New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aidan Hutchinson likely down 4-6 months with broken leg, Lions coach Dan Campbell says
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Aidan Hutchinson is likely done playing this year because of the leg injury he sustained against the Cowboys, but surgery to repair his fractured tibia and fibula “went great” and Lions coach Dan Campbell said Monday he isn't ready to declare his star pass rusher out for the
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pro rider Cam Zink breaks ribs in hard fall during Red Bull Rampage mountain biking competition
item.description: Pro mountain biker Cameron Zink suffered six broken ribs and a punctured lung after a hard crash at Red Bull Rampage -- a particularly challenging freeride competition -- in southern Utah on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Matt McCarty wins first PGA event at Black Desert Championship
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) - IVINS, Utah (AP) — Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers tie postseason mark of 33 straight scoreless innings, top Mets 9-0 in NLCS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — After spending the first seven years of his big league career back East, Jack Flaherty came home. He joined a winning team in the Los Angeles Dodgers and helped make a bit of playoff history.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield passes for 4 TDs as the Bucs treat storm-weary fans to a 51-27 win over the Saints
item.description: Baker Mayfield overcame three turnovers with 325 yards and four touchdowns passing, and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers defeated the New Orleans Saints 51-27 in what they hoped would be a morale boost to their many fans who endured Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former LSU pole vaulter Mondo Duplantis proposes to girlfriend during Vogue photo shoot
item.description: Duplantis got down on one knee and proposed to Desiré Inglander while taking photos in The Hamptons. According to Vogue Scandinavia, the couple has been together for four years.
item.dc:creator: Trinity Velazquez, NewsNation

item.title: Bears TE Cole Kmet catches 2 of Caleb Williams' 4 TD passes, handles long snaps in 35-16 rout of Jaguars in London
item.description: WATCH: Jarrett Payton loves what he's seeing from the Bears' offense in the attached video from Monday's WGN Morning News. LONDON (AP) — Chicago Bears tight end Cole Kmet faced his biggest fear in football with no notice. In a snap, you might say.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon, Penn State move behind No. 1 Texas. Army, Navy both ranked for 1st time since '60
item.description: Oregon and Penn State each moved up a spot in The Associated Press college football poll on Sunday following thrilling wins in high-profile games, and Top 25 newcomers Navy and Army are in the rankings together for the first time since 1960.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Keller scores game-winner in OT as Utah HC stays unbeaten
item.description: NEW YORK (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club took a big bite out of the Big Apple this week. After an overtime win over the New York Islanders on Thursday, Utah did the same thing to the Rangers at Madison Square Garden on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Matt McCarty takes lead at Black Desert in his 2nd PGA Tour start
item.description: Matt McCarty took a two-stroke lead into the final round in his second PGA Tour start, shooting a 7-under 64 on Saturday in the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Penn State makes its first west coast Big Ten trip to USC
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- It's not your granddaddy's Big Ten anymore and this week's conference lineup is the people's exhibit A. Minnesota heads to UCLA, Ohio State is at Oregon, and Penn State heads to USC. Three games that hardly feel like Big Ten conference play.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, NewsNation

item.title: How much are Padres tickets?
item.description: Are you hoping to cheer on the Padres from the stands of Petco Park for Game 4 of the National League Division Series?
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5
